{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 2,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The critique identifies outdated tools but doesn't explicitly link them to specific claims in the methods.",
    "R1.7": "Mentions missing citations for tool versions and lacks precision regarding model API specifics.",
    "RX.1": "Assumes all output is equally confident without explicitly stating uncertainty levels or identifying unsupported claims.",
    "RX.3": "The critique focuses on the scope of the benchmark but doesn't directly assess adherence to the requested active set.",
    "RX.4": "Thoroughly analyzes potential harm in the methodology and suggests revisions to mitigate risks.",
    "RX.5": "Doesn't discuss traceability of changes or source attribution for the critique itself."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.5
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The critique identifies outdated tools but doesn't explicitly link them to specific claims in the methods.
rationale.R1.7: Mentions missing citations for tool versions and lacks precision regarding model API specifics.
rationale.RX.1: Assumes all output is equally confident without explicitly stating uncertainty levels or identifying unsupported claims.
rationale.RX.3: The critique focuses on the scope of the benchmark but doesn't directly assess adherence to the requested active set.
rationale.RX.4: Thoroughly analyzes potential harm in the methodology and suggests revisions to mitigate risks.
rationale.RX.5: Doesn't discuss traceability of changes or source attribution for the critique itself.
